info.title: Fuel Nutrition API
info.description: Nutrition tracking API for the Fuel AI coach. Logs food, tracks weight, manages goals, and provides coaching insights.

tags.name: Food
tags.description: Food search, logging, and day view

get.description: Returns daily energy/macro budget, logged meals, weight trend series, adaptive expenditure model, adherence, and goal progress.
Ranked food search over the seed DB + OpenFoodFacts + USDA. Remote APIs fail soft. Returns up to `limit` matching foods.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text query. Empty returns seed DB foods only.

get.description: Full day view with macro targets, consumed totals, remaining budgets, and meal groups with logged entries.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to demo anchor date.

post.description: Log a food item against a day and meal slot. Returns the updated FoodDay for that date.

400.description: Invalid body or foodId not found

delete.description: Remove a logged food entry by its log ID. Returns the updated FoodDay for the date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO date of the day the entry belongs to.

404.description: Entry ID not found for that date

post.description: Copy all food entries from one date to another ('copy yesterday' flow). Returns the updated FoodDay for the destination date.

200.description: Copied successfully — returns updated destination day

get.description: Weight tracking view with trend series, smoothed stats, and headline metrics for a selected window.

post.description: Record or overwrite a scale weight for a given date. Returns updated WeightData.

200.description: Weigh-in recorded — returns updated weight data

400.description: Invalid date or weight out of range

get.description: Weekly summaries, plateau detection, adherence stats, forward projection to goal, and human-readable insight cards.
Body measurements, lift history with PRs, cardio entries, step trend, and streak stats. All generated from deterministic sample data.
Returns the active user goal configuration (mode, target weight, start weight, start date).

post.description: Overwrite the active goal. Missing optional fields fall back to the existing values.

startWeight.description: Starting body weight in kg (optional, falls back to existing).

startDate.description: ISO start date (optional, falls back to existing).

get.description: Deterministic AI coach briefing with prioritized recommendations, check-in summary, macro targets, and talking points — all grounded in the user's training data.

parameters.name: currentTarget
parameters.description: Current daily calorie target. Defaults to engine recommendation.

post.description:
Server-Sent Events streaming chat with the Gemini-powered AI coach. Can autonomously search and log foods via the `log_food` tool. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY.

Events are NDJSON (`data: {...}\n\n`): thinking, searching, found, logging, logged, reply, done, error.

sessionHistory.description: Prior conversation context for multi-turn chat.

200.description: SSE event stream. Each line is `data: {\"type\":\"thinking\"|\"searching\"|\"found\"|\"logging\"|\"logged\"|\"reply\"|\"done\"|\"error\"}\n\n`.

MealSlot.description: Meal slot for grouping food entries.

servingSize.description: Numeric size of one serving (e.g. 100 for 100g).

favorite.description: Whether user has starred this item.

loggedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when it was logged.

totals.description: Rolled-up macros for this meal slot.

groups.description: Four meal slot groups (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack).

foodId.description: Must exist in the food DB or remote cache.

scale.description: Raw scale weight (null if no weigh-in that day).

etaWeeks.description: Estimated weeks to goal (null if diverging).

weeklyAdherence.description: Fraction of last 7 days on target.

weeklyRate.description: Trend change over last 7 days (kg, signed).

totalChange.description: Trend change across full window (kg, signed).

entriesLogged.description: Days with a raw weigh-in in window.

date.description: Date of the newest data point.

avgIntake.description: Mean intake (kcal) across days with logs.

adherence.description: Fraction of days logged that hit target.

overall.description: Fraction of logged days within ±15% of target.

loggingRate.description: Fraction of all days with any intake logged.
